titleStmt.title: SII 9.223: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 223. (A.R. No. 234 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT RAGIMASALAVADA, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 52, Plavaṅga, Āshāḍha, amāvāsye, Ādityavāra, Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkramaṇa, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1127 July 10 Sunday; f.d.t. ·29, Dakshiṇāyana 15, in the reign of the Chālukya king Bhūlōkamalladēva. The Mahāsāmantādhipati Mahāpradhāna Kannaḍasandhivigrahi Sēnādhipati Bhōgabhaṭṭayya of the Sāvāsi or Sahavāsi sect of Brāhmans was in charge of the toll-revenue of the seven and a half lakh country and governing the two six-hundreds and Banavase twelve-thousand. Under the orders of the Daṇḍanāyaka Indrarāṇayya of the Sahavāsi Brāhman sect, his Perggaḍe Vujjabhaṭṭa is stated to have set up the image of Ratnabhūshaṇa-Vināyaka and constructed a sabhāmaṭa and a well and made a grant of paṇas 4 for the service of the god. The Daṇḍanāyaka Chōḷāṇḍar of Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand made a gift of paṇas 2 out of the toll of Pāṇḍya-nāḍu for the service of the same god. Heggaḍe Jōgadēvayya, Seṭṭis and Seṭṭiguttas made a voluntary contribution of some cess on their merchandise for the same purpose. Masaṇaya-Nāyaka, Mādaya-Nāyaka, Kālaya-Nāyaka and others also made similar contributions.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . vāgartthāyiva saṁpriktau vāgarttha(ḥ)pratipatta
yē . jagataḥ pitarau vaṁdē pārbatīparamēśvarau .
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatbhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samādhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
sāmantādhipati śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sāvāsigaḷadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ kannaḍasa(ṁ)ndhivigrahi sēnādhipati manaveggaḍe daṇḍanāya
kaṁ bhōgabhaṭṭayyaṁgaḷeraḍaṟunūṟumaṁ banavase pannicāsiramumaṁ saptārddhilakṣeya vaḍḍalāvuḷada suṁkamu
maṁ paḍedu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādasēvānirata . śrīmadviprakuḷavyō
māmritakiraṇanakhiḷajanasaṁstutyaṁ śrīrāmadhāmanudāttaprēmaṁ negaḷdiṁdrarāṇadaṇḍādhīśa . vritta . stu .
maraneṁbarppaluveṁbarittaḍavanaṁ kalleṁbarī dhēnumaṁ puruṣākārade nīgaleṁdogedudo bhūlōkadoḷ nōḍe tatsurabhūjaṁ su
radhēnuvutsavade cintāratnaveṁdeṁdu bittarikuṁ dhāriṇi yiṁdarāṇananiḷālōkaykavikhyātanaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ Āsthānavastunāyakaṁ bhavānīvallabha
caraṇasarasīruhaṣaṭcaraṇaṁ . kāśmīraviṣayāṁbhōjinīsahaśrakiraṇaṁ sāradādēvilabdhavaraprasādaṁ . caṁpakā
mōdaṁ vivēkavidyādharaṁ . sakaḷakaḷādharaṁ . sahavāsijananicayaśukarasaphaḷasahakāraṁ samastaguṇa
gaṇāḷaṁkāraṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsira
da vaḍḍarāvuḷada kīḷbaṭṭeyaccupannāyada daṇḍanāyakaṁ yiṁdarāṇibhaṭṭayyaṁgaḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ varttisuttira
lā rāyanarddhāṁgalakṣmī svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇaphaḷasahaśrabhōgabhāgine dvitīyalakṣmīsamāne kaḷahaṁ
sagamaneyappa śrīmanmahānāyaki daṇḍanāyakiti ratnadēviyakkaṁgaḷu . bhāgyaṁ samanisidaḍe saubhāgyaṁ
saṁmanisadu mattinabaleyarggenduṁ bhāgyamumaṁ niravadhisaubhāgyamumaṁ ratniyakkanōrvvaḷe paḍedaḷu . Antavara pe
rggaḍe vujjibhaṭṭanē doreyaneṁdaḍe . sthiranē mērumahādri satyayutanē kānīnanatyaṁtasundharanē kantunibhaṁ pratāpadharanē
bhīmānujaṁ tyāgiyē surabhūjaṁ śuciyē babāppu paranārīdūraneṁdeṁdu bittarikuṁ dhāriṇi vujjabhaṭṭa
naniḷālōkaykavikhyātana . Aṁtenisi negaḷda samastaguṇasaṁpanna śrīmatu heggaḍe vujjibhaṭṭayyaṁ . śrīmanmahā
pradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ Iṁdirāṇayyaṁgaḷa besadiṁ śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 52 neya plavaṁgasaṁvatsarada
Āṣāḍhadamāvāsye Ādityavāraṁ dakṣiṇāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta puṇyadinadoḷu śrīratnabhūṣaṇavinā
yakadēvara pratiṣṭheyumaṁ sabhāmaṭaṁge bāviyumuṁ māḍisi biṭṭa dharmmaventeṁdaḍe . mosaḷemaḍuvina ṭhāṇāntaradalu vaḍḍarāvu
ḷada suṁkadoḷage tiṁgaḷige paṇaveraḍu . pannāyada suṁkadoḷage tiṁgaḷiṁge paṇaveraḍu . matta
rūḍhivaḍedirdda pāṇḍyananāḍina perjjuṁkadādhikāradoḷoḷpaṁ māḍuvenendārpinoḷoḍagūḍi
danā cōḷadēva daṇḍādhīśaṁ . svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapa
davīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhasaktitrayaguṇasaṁ
pannaṁ nuḍidumattannaṁ . nayavinayacārucaritraṁ . parāṁganāputra . kāminīma
nōraṁjana Āśritajanakalpavrikṣa baṁdhucintāmaṇi māvanaṁkakāṟaṁ parabaḷasūṟekāṟaṁ
duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhusōmēsvaradēvapādārādhakarappa śrī
matu noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsirada mahāpradhānaṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ
cōḷāṇḍaru ratnabhūṣaṇavināyakadēvara nivēdyakke herjjuṁkadalu tiṁgaḷiṁge paṇaveraḍaṁ bi
ṭṭaru Avara perggaḍe jōgadēvayya nāḍiṁga bīḍiṁga nānādēsigaṁ binnapaṁgeydu yī ṭhā
ṇāṁtarada dharmakkanukūlateyāda . vinayada mēruvendu suciyeṁdu budhāśritadhā
raneṁdu sajjananidhiyeṁdu satyada tavarmmaneyeṁdu vivēkiyeṁdu peṁpina kaṇiyeṁdu sārdda
reḍaṟeṁba tamakinaneṁdu rūḍhivettanupamadhairyyaneṁdu pogaḷguṁ dhare perggaḍe jōgadēvana .
svasti samastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita nayavinayajārucaritra vīrabaḷaṁjadharmmapratipāḷana visuddaguḍḍadhvaja
ruṁ bhagavatīdēvilabdhavaraprasādaruṁ samastabhalluṁkidaṇḍahastarappa teṁka kaṁci baḍaga himasētuvā
diyāgi samastanānādēsigaḷuṁ seṭṭiyaruṁ seṭṭiguttaru(ṁ)virddu ratnabhūṣaṇavināyakadēvara pūje
ge Aṟavaṁṭigegaṁ biṭṭa dharmmaveṁteṁdeḍe pēḷiyalu paṇavaydu kāraḍake meḷasina pēṟeṁge A
re vīse davasada pēṟeṁge yoṭṭiṁge hāgavaṁ biṭṭu yī dēsiya dharmmavaṁ Ārādoḍaṁ kiḍalīyade pratipāḷi
suvudu . mata telagiya masaṇayanāyakanu kadatiya mārayanāyakanu tamma suṁkadalli hala
geya bhaṁḍiyalu barisakke nālku haṇavaṁ biṭṭaru . matta telagiya kāḷayanāyakanuṁ kadatiya bādeyanā
yakanuṁ tamma koḍavīsadoḷage barisakke nālku haṇavaṁ biṭṭaru . �yoyuṁbaḷiya Āruṁbavaruṁ salisuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.223 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
